MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Annie Lee, is present.
Attorney, Edward Hung, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Patrick Foo Tzeng, is present.
Attorney, Mary Moycik, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer , litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of Feb-16-2009 is vacated.
